name: GSR III Acquisition Corp. Ordinary Shares
summary: GSR III Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company seeks to identify and partner with a private company, enabling it to become publicly listed through the merger. GSRT is headquartered in Menlo Park, California.
